description: Trousseau list (taqwīm) for Sitt al-Waqār bt. Bū l-Riḍā b. Tamīm. Gives details of the items with numbers next to them. Dating: The document is dated ambiguously, 19 Elul '28; the handwriting is consistent with 13th century, so the most plausible options are 1528 Seleucid (=1217 CE) or 5028 AM (=1268 CE). (Information in part from Goitein’s index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
